transcript: Speaker A: मैं सुबह वर्ड्स याद करता हूँ और शाम तक भूल जाता हूँ। [I memorize words in the morning and forget them by evening.] Speaker B: क्योंकि तुम अभी भी ये 3 मिस्टेक्स कर रहे हो। [Because you are still making these 3 mistakes.] पहला कि इंग्लिश को स्कूल के सब्जेक्ट की तरह याद कर रहे हो। [First, you are memorizing English like a school subject.] दूसरा कि तुम एक्सपेंसिव कोचिंग ज्वाइन करके टाइम वेस्ट कर रहे हो। [Second, you are wasting time by joining expensive coaching.] तीसरा कि तुम मोबाइल पर स्क्रॉल करके टाइम वेस्ट कर रहे हो। [Third, you are wasting time by scrolling on mobile.] Speaker A: प्लीज मुझे बताओ तो मैं क्या करूँ? [Please tell me, what should I do?] Speaker B: MySivi इंस्टॉल करो और एआई टीचर के साथ प्रैक्टिस करो। [Install MySivi and practice with the AI teacher.] Speaker C: Do you speak English? Speaker A: A little, little. तुम क्या कर रहे हो? [What are you doing?] I sleeping on bed. Speaker C: "I sleeping on bed" नहीं, "I am sleeping in my bed" होता है। ["I sleeping on bed" is incorrect, it is "I am sleeping in my bed".] Speaker A: ओके ओके। तुमने खाना खाया? [Okay okay. Did you eat food?] Yes, I took dinner. Speaker C: "I took dinner" नहीं, "I had my dinner" होगा। ["I took dinner" is incorrect, it will be "I had my dinner".] Speaker A: ओके ओके। I had my dinner. मेरी इंग्लिश कितने दिनों में अच्छी हो जाएगी? [Okay okay. I had my dinner. In how many days will my English get better?] Speaker C: रोज़ मेरे साथ बस 10-15 मिनट प्रैक्टिस करो एंड तुम्हारी इंग्लिश थोड़े दिनों में खुद अच्छी हो जाएगी। [Just practice with me for 10-15 minutes daily and your English will improve on its own in a few days.] Speaker A: पर ये तो कॉस्टली होगा ना? [But this must be costly, right?] Speaker C: बिल्कुल नहीं। तुम सिर्फ एक रुपये में ट्रायल स्टार्ट कर सकते हो। [Not at all. You can start a trial for just one rupee.] Speaker A: वाओ! फिर शुरू कैसे करूँ? [Wow! Then how do I start?] Speaker C: बस इंस्टॉल बटन पर क्लिक करो, MySivi ऐप इंस्टॉल करो और 15 डेज इंग्लिश लर्निंग चैलेंज शुरू करो। [Just click on the install button, install the MySivi app, and start the 15 days English learning challenge.] Speaker D: Install Now पे क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on Install Now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: MAIN SUBAH WORDS BHOOL KYUNKI School Subject PEHLA Expensive Coaching DUSRA Scrolling phone all day TEESRA MySivi Arya AI Teacher Practice Now Fluency Score Your Learning Path Talk about anything Daily routine Let's Improve Vocabulary Talk about your childhood Seasons and weather Family and Relationships Hobbies and Interests Talk about your workplace DO YOU SPEAK A LITTLE TUM KYA KAR REHE I sleeping on bed I am sleeping in my bed OK OK TUMNE I took dinner I had my dinner OK OK I MERI ACHI HO JAYEGI 10-15 MINUTES PRACTICE KARO AND THODE DINO KHUD ACHI PAR YE TO COSTLY BILKUL NAHI MySivi Premium 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1 24/7 AI English Teacher 500+ Exercises and Lessons Unlimited Access WOW PHIR SHURU MySivi AI English Speaking App BAS MYSIVI APP AUR 15 DAYS LEARNING MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: An animated brain character learns to stop memorizing English like a school subject and starts practicing with MySivi's AI teacher. The AI robot corrects common grammatical errors in real-time, demonstrating the app's interactive features. The ad promotes a 3-day premium trial for just 1 rupee and urges users to download the app.
